text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I did it! I won, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was so focused on running as fast as I can that I
crossed the finish line before I even knew it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I guess I am capable of coming in first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Winning has already made my day, but
getting praised is icing on the cake!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I gotta tell my mom about today in the next letter
I write her. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I might've won today, but who knows what the
next race will be like. I gotta stay focused!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice! I'm gonna keep giving it
my all!
